Name: CALA
Description: A Tel Aviv boutique chain founded in 2002, fashion that listens. A personal, intuitive approach to style selection, celebrating individuality at every size, age, and occasion, known for its strong vintage and seasonal collections.

Name: Seestarz
Description: Born from a sisterhood and a wildly popular Instagram fashion blog, Alona and Daniela's curated edit covers swimwear, streetwear and more from a roster of brands they love.

Name: Zohi Sabina
Description: A curated multi-brand boutique stocking a refined edit of Israeli womenswear and accessories, quietly confident essentials and considered seasonal pieces in one place.

Name: Shmua
Description: An Israeli concept shop bringing together a thoughtful mix of local labels, clothing, accessories and lifestyle pieces under one quietly opinionated roof.

Name: Tema
Description: A Tel Aviv concept store curating an edited selection of Israeli and international designers, clothing, objects and accessories chosen with a strong point of view. Kiryat Shaul 24, Tel Aviv · 03-6442356.

Name: Haparlament
Description: A multi-brand boutique stocking Israeli designers, followed and shopped through Instagram.

Name: DA Studio
Description: The Emek Hefer studio-shop of designer Tula, who sells her own brand alongside a curated roster of other Israeli labels. Gesher HaEtz, Emek Hefer Industrial Zone.

Name: Razili
Description: Razili, also operating as a multi-brand store stocking a curated mix of Israeli labels alongside her own line.

Name: Rene and Danielle
Description: A Tel Aviv treasure-box of a concept store, opened 2019, renamed for the owner's grandmother Renée, a sharp-eyed, beauty-loving woman who arrived from Egypt in the 1950s. A carefully chosen collection of local handcraft, homeware, gifts, and lifestyle and beauty objects, united by natural materials and soft, harmonious palettes. Every visit is a small journey of discovery.

Name: Belle and Sue
Description: Israel's pioneering online fashion boutique since 2010, curating international labels, championing local designers, and launching their own FEZ brand of considered everyday essentials.

Name: AKA My Culture
Description: A curated selection of international eco-conscious labels, DR. DENIM, THINKING MU, BAGGU, alongside the in-house brand IN BLOOM, crafting casual Israeli fashion with an environmental conscience.

Name: Story
Description: Founded in 2008 to rewrite the Israeli shopping experience, a multi-brand chain that hand-picks labels with a conscience. Right materials, fair production, animal welfare, and pieces built to last. Beauty matters, but so does the story behind it. Give a damn.

Name: Comme il Faut
Description: The iconic Comme il Faut space at the Tel Aviv port, a feminist concept store and gallery that carries the house's own artistic womenswear alongside a curated selection of other Israeli labels.

Name: En Culture
Description: A concept space and creative lab founded in 2021 on Lilienblum St, redefining streetwear by bridging the Far East and the Middle East. A curated lineup of avant-garde Asian designers and progressive houses, Lu'u Dan, PAF, Kidill, Walter Van Beirendonck, Feng Chen Wang, and more.

Name: Shtayim
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. King George 86, Tel Aviv · 050-3340018.

Name: Pink
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. Ussishkin 29, Ramat HaSharon · 03-5404124.

Name: Bashin VeAyin
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. HaTzaftzefa 1, Ramat Yishai · 04-983-0821.

Name: Ronita
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. Derech HaOren 1, Kibbutz Merhavia · 04-6898222.

Name: Hagar Boutique
Description: A second-hand boutique of Israeli fashion and vintage finds. Boacha Yodfat complex · 04-8225866.

Name: Lola
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. HaMeyasdim 25, Karkur · 04-6247192 / 058-6606123.

Name: Moment
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. Rehavat Adi 1, Shoham · 054-4972133.

Name: Michli
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. Betzalel 6, Jerusalem · 02-6254303.

Name: Reuta
Description: A multi-brand boutique of Israeli womenswear and design. Sderot HaMakabim 10, Renanim Center, Maccabim-Reut · 050-8928070.
